description: Likely removes distractor colors or extracts/recolors the relevant structure while preserving the canvas size. Removes input color(s) [2, 3]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: color subset. Inferred transformation family: delete/extract/recolor. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_aabf363d(I):
    x1 = leastcolor(I)
    x2 = replace(I, x1, ZERO)
    x3 = leastcolor(x2)
    O = replace(x2, x3, x1)
    return O
